title: Knightly Weaponry
description: Adds 7 new weapons to the game.
body:
Knightly Weaponry is a MCreator mod that adds 7 new weapons to the game

Rapiers - Fast, Weak, Average Durability

Greatswords - Slow, Very Strong, High Durability

Spears - Slow, Strong, Average Durability

Daggers - Very Fast, Very Weak, Cheap, Low Durability

Battle Staffs - Average Speed, Weak, Average Durability

Hammers - Very Slow, Very Strong, Average Durability

Battle Axes - Slow, Strong, Low Durability

This is my first mod so expect it to be a bit unbalanced. (especially with the daggers)

I recommend to use Just Enough Items to see the recipies for the weapons and Better Combat for a better feel.
